USUSDT.P.bias: Post pump-and-dump. Full retrace complete; price is entering the impulse origin base (0.0164-0.0176). Only a confirmed base reaction is tradable; falling-knife limits are forbidden.

entry.basis: Impulse origin base retest per Parabolic Spike Rule. Requires a 1H rejection/confirmation candle inside the base; no blind limit into the dump.

USUSDT.P.invalidation: 1H acceptance below 0.0158 kills the base; below that, next demand is 0.0127-0.0140 and the long idea is dead.
USUSDT.P.nearest_liquidity: Buy-side above 0.0182 bounce high, then 0.0205-0.0208 shelf and 0.0217; sell-side below 0.0170 overnight low, then 0.0158 and 0.0152 base wicks.
USUSDT.P.reclaim_status: 0.0182 is the strength trigger: a 1H close above it after a base hold confirms the reaction. Not reclaimed; price is fading into the base.
USUSDT.P.relative_strength: Worst performer on the visible day (-26% vs BTC -1.6%); this is a mean-reversion base play, not a relative-strength long.
USUSDT.P.notes: 2026-07-07 ~06:26 UTC+1 reanalysis after full pump retrace. Chart canvas failed to render in the automated tab; levels derived from the 06:11 UTC+1 1H capture, live tick (~0.0179), and ledger history. Spike rule applied: only the origin-base retest long is valid; overhead 0.0205-0.0217 is supply until reclaimed. CHART NOT MARKED - indicator re-paste required.
